title: Hex to Text
description:
Hexadecimal encoding represents characters using base-16 values.

Your task: Decode the following hexadecimal string:

6865785f69735f66756e
hints: The string only contains the numbers 0-9 and letters a-f
Each pair of characters represents a single letter
Use 'From Hex' in CyberChef, every two characters will become one readable character
